name: MV Oil Trust
summary: MV Oil Trust (MVO) is a statutory trust that holds net profits interests in oil and natural gas properties located in the Mid-Continent region, operated by MV Partners, LLC. The Trust receives a percentage of net profits from the sale of oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids produced from these properties and distributes proceeds to unitholders.

products.name: Net Profits Interest
products.description: A nonoperating interest entitling the Trust to a share of gross production revenues from oil and natural gas properties after deducting associated costs.

products.name: Crude Oil Production
products.description: Oil produced from Mid-Continent region properties operated by MV Partners, LLC.

products.name: Natural Gas and NGLs Production
products.description: Natural gas and natural gas liquids produced from Mid-Continent region properties operated by MV Partners, LLC.

partnerships.description: Operator of oil and natural gas properties underlying the Trust's net profits interests in the Mid-Continent region.
